title: get api v1 health returns status ok
description: Verify that a GET request to /api/v1/health returns a 200 status code with a response indicating the backend service is running and healthy.

title: post api v1 session upload with valid csv and jwt
description: Test uploading a valid CSV file with a valid JWT token to /api/v1/session/upload returns 200 with session_id, pending status, and dataset_info, and starts the analysis session.

title: post api v1 session upload without jwt returns unauthorized
description: Verify that a POST request to /api/v1/session/upload without a JWT token returns a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: post api v1 session upload with invalid or empty csv returns validation error
description: Ensure that uploading an invalid or empty CSV file to /api/v1/session/upload returns a 400 validation error and no session is created.

title: get api v1 session sessionid status with valid jwt returns progress
description: Check that a GET request to /api/v1/session/{session_id}/status with a valid JWT returns 200 with current pipeline step and progress details.

title: get api v1 session sessionid status without jwt returns unauthorized
description: Verify that a GET request to /api/v1/session/{session_id}/status without a JWT returns a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: get api v1 session sessionid status for unknown sessionid returns not found
description: Ensure that a GET request to /api/v1/session/{session_id}/status with an unknown session_id returns a 404 Not Found response.

title: get api v1 session sessionid analysis after completion returns insights
description: Test that a GET request to /api/v1/session/{session_id}/analysis after analysis completion returns 200 with final insights and generated charts.

title: get api v1 session sessionid analysis before completion returns not ready error
description: Verify that a GET request to /api/v1/session/{session_id}/analysis before analysis completion returns a response indicating the analysis is not yet ready or an equivalent non-200 error.

title: get api v1 history with valid jwt returns paginated history
description: Check that a GET request to /api/v1/history with a valid JWT returns 200 with a paginated list of the authenticated user's past analysis sessions.
